interface.longDescription:
Learn skills that move you forward with the Udemy app in ChatGPT. With Udemy, you can turn your curiosity, questions, and “I need to figure this out” moments into real progress.

Just tell ChatGPT what you want to learn, and the Udemy app helps you discover courses and video previews from real-world experts. Explore what skills you can learn, how the course is structured, and if it fits your goals — before diving in.

Millions of learners around the world use Udemy to build practical skills for work and life. Now, finding the right course happens where learning begins, so you can keep moving forward.
defaultPrompt: I want to learn Python by building real projects
